creator: carpathia@h24-76-76-76.vc.shawcable.net
text:
> Exactly what is the point of your PR ? Is it a request for a new port that
> someone else should provide? In that case please specify more information
> about the program and I will see what I can do. At the very least I need
> a URL.

Heh, that wasn't one of my brighter moments.  It was late, and I was
tired, and I forgot to attach the port.  (I sent it, stood up, and went
"doh!")  It's attached now.

Sorry 'bout that.  :-)

Jeremy
